abort.already_configured: This Azure DevOps project is already configured.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to Azure DevOps.
error.invalid_auth: The PAT or organization is invalid.
error.no_projects: No visible projects were returned for this organization.
error.project_not_found: The selected project is no longer available. Please choose it again.
error.required_field: Organization and personal access token are required.

user.title: Connect to Azure DevOps
user.description: If no Azure DevOps Tracker entries exist yet, enter the organization and PAT here. If entries already exist, choose or enter the organization first and the next step will handle PAT selection.

credentials.title: Choose credentials
credentials.description: Choose an existing PAT for this organization or enter a new organization-scoped PAT.

reauth_confirm.title: [%key:common::config_flow::title::reauth%]
reauth_confirm.description: Azure DevOps Tracker needs a new personal access token for this organization.

reconfigure.title: Update personal access token
reconfigure.description: Enter a replacement personal access token for this Azure DevOps project.

project.title: Choose project and features
project.description: Pick the Azure DevOps project to monitor and enable the data domains you want Home Assistant to load.
